description: GovTribe is a government contracting and grants intelligence platform that provides data on opportunities, awards, vendors, agencies, files, and related market activity. It also offers AI-oriented access to that data and workspace actions through its MCP server.
summary: GovTribe exposes an OAuth-protected streamable HTTP MCP server at `https://govtribe.com/mcp`, documented for direct developer use and also configurable with a GovTribe-issued MCP API key; no separate public REST/GraphQL API or first-party CLI was confirmed from current docs.
